text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking along the<n>riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew! Okay, after this break, I'll do<n>another run!
choice_data_list: What a hard worker you are.
What a hard worker you are.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. You're one of the trainers<n>from the
academy, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the compliment!<n>However, I'm still
not where I want to<n>be.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's someone I look up to, and I'll<n>have to
work much harder if I ever<n>hope to catch up to
her!
choice_data_list: And who's that, if I may ask?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen is—I mean, Maruzensky is<n>my idol!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's so fast and elegant and cool!<n>Not only that,
she's great at driving<n>and delightfully kind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's the flashiest gentlewoman<n>ever! She's
my everything!
choice_data_list:
("Flashy gentlewoman"? I've never heard two
more incongruous terms...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is... Maruzen is<n>just sooo
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I hope I can be asincredible as her one day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You're right...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No matter how hard I try, I'll never be<n>Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
In every age are faint hopes doomed<n>to be
trapped in the fickle and violent<n>line between
dream and reality...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But at the very least, my dream of<n>standing on
the same stage as her<n>one day is still within my
grasp. At<n>least, I believe it is.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay true to myself and continue<n>working hard
without overdoing it. By<n>doing so, I'm sure I, too,
will bloom<n>someday.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you! I feel a lot more<n>confident now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, break time's over! It's time to<n>get running
again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I feel much more sure of<n>myself
hearing that from you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it will be a long and perilous road<n>to get to
where Maruzen is. She's<n>accomplished some
truly amazing<n>things.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Still, I believe I'll be able to stand on<n>the same
stage as her one day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I may be but a small bud now, but if I<n>work hard
each and every day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My dream will come into a full and<n>beautiful
bloom, just as the cherry<n>blossoms do every
spring!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, break time's over! It's time to<n>get running
again!
